channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress and table base dumped, 13th April
item.description:
Outside number 61 Brookedene rd. Here overnight. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At junction Lynmouth Road, 13th April
item.description:
Huge pile of discarded items .. see photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Darenth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in the garden of 71 Cronin Street, 13th April
item.description:
There has been a dead fox in the garden of 71 Cronin Street for a few weeks and we’d like to report it since it will attract flies during the summer.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cronin Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight here on during the day, 13th April
item.description:
The one located in front of the bus shelter here.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped tyre, 13th April
item.description:
Dumped tyre
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 238, Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Car illegally parked, 13th April
item.description:
Blocking in 4 x residents parking bays for 4 days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pastoral Way, Warley, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated dog fouling, 13th April
item.description:
The last 3 weeks there has been continuous dog fouling left on pavements in Hamilton Road Sidcup
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked every day, 13th April
item.description:
10’s of bikes every morning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7-9, Copthall Avenue, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Front garden full of rubbish, 13th April
item.description:
The front garden of this house if full of layers of refuse and rubbish. It has been like this and getting worse for weeks and now piled high to the window level. Its clearly a health and vermin hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bayston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked road drain outside 5 towncourt crescent br5 1pg, 13th April
item.description:
Ref. 8852659 (6 feb 2026). reported by lb bromley as fixed online, but in reality still blocked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The grass area in chalkenden close, 13th April
item.description:
Please can you visit the grass area at the side of the building number are 30-36. the area needs litter picking .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chalkenden Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left outside my home for past 2weeks not been moved once, window left open., 13th April
item.description:
Car is unlocked and windows open. Don't know if car was dumped in a rush.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tallis Grove, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every day same story, 13th April
item.description:
People keep throwing illegally rubbish at this location used by pedestrian

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morley Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture, 13th April
item.description:
Outside Mistral

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Service Road 2, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: All street lamps in close need repainting, 13th April
item.description:
There at 3 street lamps on our property and a lot of the paint has peeled off. Would it possible to schedule them to be repainted please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sylvan Walk, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bags of dumped rubbish, with a child’s bike, 13th April
item.description:
This rubbish was dumped on the grass area today

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winn Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
